turnaround_reason: Coty stock collapsed from $5.33 to $1.82 on disappointing performance and CEO Sue Nabi's departure. New interim CEO Markus Strobel launched 'Coty. Curated' turnaround strategy, debt reduced to lowest level in a decade via Wella divestiture ($750M used to pay down debt), and Marc Jacobs Beauty relaunch driving optimism. Stock at $2.18 with P/B 0.62 and EV/EBITDA 6.7x looks deeply discounted if execution improves.
bullish_points: Debt reduced to lowest leverage in close to a decade — Wella stake sale brought in $750M
P/B of 0.62 and EV/EBITDA of 6.7x — trading below book value with real brands (Gucci, Burberry, Calvin Klein, Marc Jacobs fragrances)
Interim CEO Markus Strobel has a clear 'Coty. Curated' framework: sharper priorities, focused investments, portfolio review
Prestige fragrance is a resilient category — Burberry and Kylie Cosmetics showing mid-single-digit growth
Skin care brands Lancaster and Philosophy posting double-digit growth
Insider buying: CFO Laurent Mercier bought at $2.65, Director Gordon von Bretten bought 83K shares at $2.41
60% insider/institutional ownership by JAB — sponsor has incentive to fix or sell
Forward PE of 6.2x — market pricing near-distress
bearish_points: Revenue declining (-1.3% TTM), operating margins negative (-0.6%)
Massive debt load: $3.4B against $257M cash — interest costs consume cash flow
Consumer Beauty division weak (-6% LFL), CoverGirl future uncertain under portfolio review
Interim CEO — no permanent leadership yet, execution risk high
JAB controlling stake limits upside optionality (no takeover premium possible without sponsor)
Analyst target mean $3.13 — only ~43% upside to consensus target
Q2 FY2026 EPS missed badly (-$0.03 vs expected profitable)
catalyst: Permanent CEO appointment + 'Coty. Curated' strategy execution showing LFL revenue stabilization + potential Consumer Beauty divestiture unlocking value
catalyst_timing: Q3 FY2026 earnings (May 2026 already reported as Q2); next earnings Aug 2026; CEO search timeline unknown
suggested_trade: Spot only — too leveraged and uncertain for options; small position as a deep-value speculation on brand portfolio + debt reduction
key_risk: Debt service consumes cash flow before turnaround can gain traction; consumer beauty divestiture may be forced at low prices
would_skip_if: Liquidity deteriorates further (current ratio drops below 0.7); no permanent CEO by Q4; revenue acceleration to the downside
